plugin_desc: Fibrolan Falcon carrier Ethernet and IEEE 1588 transmission SNMP baseline child template. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: Transmission
